name: a rotting skeleton
rumor: "Shattered Skeleton Femur" comes from a community reference table the user described as rumored drops, not confirmed via an in-game screenshot like the rest of this monster's drop list — treat it as less certain than the other entries above. "Tattered Cloth Cap" and "Tattered Cloth Gorget" are inferred, not directly screenshot-confirmed for this monster — per the user's 2026-07-12 rule, a monster confirmed dropping one piece of a quality set (this one already had 4 other Tattered Cloth pieces) is assumed to be able to drop any other known piece of that same set.

name: a Bloodynose quarreler
rumor: The Tattered Cloth pieces beyond Gorget are inferred, not directly screenshot-confirmed for this monster — per the user's 2026-07-12 rule, a monster confirmed dropping one piece of a quality set is assumed to be able to drop any other known piece of that same set.

name: Night Terror
rumor: Spawns in The Concourse of Souls, a spot within the Necropolis area, only at night, after one of the Desert Bat placeholder mobs there is killed - seemingly random which one triggers it, not all of them.

name: a sly farmhand
rumor: Map inferred from batch timing — this screenshot arrived right after a run of other Sungreet Strand monster pictures, but no filename/chat text explicitly named the zone for this one specifically.

name: an ashira warrior
rumor: Directly confirmed via loot-window screenshots: Raw Ashira Meat, Tattered Cloth Cap, Tattered Cloth Pantaloons, Tattered Cloth Boots, Ashira Warrior Pelt, Ashira Warrior Necklace, Ashira Warrior Bracer, Onion, Garlic, Cabbage, Tattered Rawhide Gorget, Tattered Rawhide Belt, Worn Buckler, Worn Bow, Torch, Rusty Warhammer, and Rusty Axe. Everything else in this drop list is inferred — per the user's 2026-07-12 rule, once a monster is confirmed dropping one piece of a quality set (Rusty weapons via Warhammer/Axe, Tattered Cloth via Cap/Pantaloons/Boots, Tattered Rawhide via Gorget/Belt), it's assumed to be able to drop any other known piece of that same set. Tattered Rawhide Gloves/Bracer/Boots/Vest, Rusty Long Spear, and Tattered Cloth Veil are newly-discovered pieces of those quality sets (via a smuggler/a wererat/an angered spirit's own loot windows, 2026-07-12) backfilled in here too.

name: an ashira lookout
rumor: Directly confirmed via loot-window screenshots: Ashira Scout Necklace, Ashira Tail, Cloth Scraps, Rawhide Scraps, Raw Ashira Meat, Bell Pepper, and Rusty Trident. Every other Rusty weapon/shield in this list (including Rusty Long Spear, a newly-discovered Rusty piece as of 2026-07-12) is inferred — per the user's 2026-07-12 rule, once a monster is confirmed dropping one piece of a quality set, it's assumed to be able to drop any other known piece of that same set. No map confirmed yet for this monster.

name: the corrupted ashira
rumor: A fan-wiki-style reference table listed a full "Corrupted Leather" armor set for this monster, including "Corrupted Leather Cap" (Head) and "Corrupted Leather Boots" (Feet). "Sand-Blasted Coif"/"Sand-Blasted Boots" were previously (incorrectly) recorded here too, assumed to be alternate Head/Feet drops — the user has since confirmed those two actually drop in a different zone, not from this monster, so they've been removed from this drop list. 9 of the 14 Corrupted Leather pieces (Cap, Mask, Shoulderpads, Cloak, Robe, Bracer, Belt, Gloves, Boots) aren't in items.json yet since the source table has no Weight/Size data for them — see images/items-needing-text.txt. A separate "named monsters (bosses) in Vale of Zintar" reference table lists a boss named "a corrupted ashira" (note the "a" instead of "the") dropping only "Ashira War Tooth" and "Ashira Hunter Tooth" (both Primary/Secondary weapons, no stats known yet) — assumed to be this same boss and merged in here, but neither of those two sources mentions the other's drops at all, so this identification isn't fully confirmed. Flag for correction if "a corrupted ashira" turns out to be a different monster than this one.

name: Toma the Two-Faced
rumor: "Smuggler's Greaves" is attributed to this Toma based on the item's own name — no monster thumbnail was visible in that screenshot, but it matches the same "Smuggler's" naming already confirmed here via "Smuggler's Damaged Logbook" (Toma's location, Smugglers Camp). Toma's Signet Ring, Cloth Scraps, Torch, and Tattered Rawhide Gloves are directly confirmed via a loot-window screenshot (2026-07-12). The rest of the Tattered Rawhide family (Gorget, Belt, Mask, Bracer, Boots, Vest) is inferred per the user's 2026-07-12 quality-set rule, now that Toma is confirmed dropping one piece (Gloves).

name: a large crypt broodmatron
rumor: "Infected Crypt" is assumed to be an area within the Ancient Crypt map (the same relationship as Necropolis within Night Harbor) rather than its own map, since no separate "Infected Crypt" map exists — flag for correction if that turns out to be wrong. This monster's orange nameplate and "large"/boss-style naming are why it's marked as named/boss; note the very similar name to "a crypt broodmother" (seen in a separate loot-window screenshot the same day) — these may turn out to be the same creature, but each is recorded exactly as its own screenshot displayed it rather than merged on a guess.

name: a wererat
rumor: Directly confirmed via loot-window screenshots: Rusty Dagger, Rawhide Scraps, Wererat Pelt, Rusty Scythe, Tattered Rawhide Bracer, Worn Bow, Tattered Rawhide Boots, Rusty Tower Shield, Tattered Rawhide Vest, Cloth Scraps, Severed Ring Finger, Spirit World Ch. 1, Rusty Warhammer, and Tattered Cloth Pantaloons. Everything else in this drop list is inferred — per the user's 2026-07-12 rule, once a monster is confirmed dropping one piece of a quality set (Rusty weapons, Tattered Rawhide, Tattered Cloth), it's assumed to be able to drop any other known piece of that same set. Tattered Rawhide Gloves/Bracer/Boots/Vest are newly-discovered additions to that quality-set roster from this monster's (and Toma the Two-Faced's) screenshots, and have been backfilled onto every other monster already known to drop other Tattered Rawhide pieces. name: an angered spirit
rumor: Map inferred from batch timing (arrived amid a run of Sungreet Strand screenshots), not explicitly named in the filename/chat. Directly confirmed via a loot-window screenshot: Tattered Cloth Veil, Worn Bow, and Onion. The rest of the Tattered Cloth family is inferred per the user's 2026-07-12 quality-set rule, and Tattered Cloth Veil (a newly-discovered 9th piece of that family) has been backfilled onto every other monster already known to drop other Tattered Cloth pieces.
